item.title: Slight delay in decision notifications
item.description: There will be a slight delay in the paper decision notification. Our apologies. Hang on, it’s coming soon!

item.title: Submission deadline extended
item.description:
Following multiple requests, the HotCarbon’25 submission deadline is extended by one week, to May 19, 2025 (AoE)

hotcarbon25.hotcrp.com

item.title: Submission site open
item.description:
The submission site for HotCarbon 2025 is now open!

hotcarbon25.hotcrp.com

item.title: CfP out & Venue confirmed!
item.description:
The HotCarbon 2025 Call for Papers is out! Submission deadline is May 12, 2025.

The workshop will take place on July 10-11th 2025 at the Microsoft NERD center, Cambridge, MA, USA.
Check out the Attend page for more details.

item.title: Get ready for HotCarbon'25!
item.description:
After the success of its third edition, HotCarbon will be back in 2025 with a 1.5 day program! (or even 2 days, if necessary). Like in previous editions, the workshop will be collocated with OSDI and take place on July 10 and 11 in Cambridge, MA, USA.

We are delighted to have Timo Hoenig and Abel Souza as co-chairs of the 2025 program committee.
Stay tuned for the CfP!

item.title: Wrap up of HotCarbon'24
item.description:
The 2024 edition of HotCarbon was a vibrant success! Thank you to all authors and participants for the great interaction.
Stay tuned for the 2025 edition!

item.title: The program in online
item.description: The workshop program is online, along with all the final papers and the videos of the virtual presentations. Check them out!

item.title: Registration is now open!
item.description:
The workshop registration is now open.
You can find further details about attending the event on the corresponding page.

item.title: Change in location
item.description:
The workshop location is changed from Santa Clara to Santa Cruz, CA.
It will be held in UCSC Haybarn.

item.title: [NEW] Registration deadline
item.description: There is now a paper registration deadline, set to May 5, 2024 (AoE).
